## Summary

<!-- What changed and why. One or two sentences. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Content (HTML / copy / image / blog post)
- [ ] Style / design tokens
- [ ] Script / interactivity
- [ ] Infrastructure (deploy, CI/CD, Docker, Caddy)
- [ ] Supabase (migration, edge function, RLS)

## Checks

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or private keys committed
- [ ] Site builds locally (`npm start` renders without console errors)
- [ ] Relative links still work
- [ ] No purple / indigo hues introduced
- [ ] If infra change: tested on a non-production target first
- [ ] If Supabase change: migration uses `IF EXISTS`/`IF NOT EXISTS` and RLS is enforced

## Deployment impact

<!-- Does this require a VM change, DNS change, Cloudflare change,
     new GitHub secret, or a Supabase migration? -->
